title: Review: byte-path validation + GCP SM zeroization fixes
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — All changes in this batch are straightforward correctness and documentation improvements. No new API surface. Tests are comprehensive.
Confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. I am out of real complaints. The remaining gaps (byte-level surrogate non-validation, reqwest buffer not zeroed, put body not zeroed) are all documented intentional limitations. I am bikeshedding.
